news.title: CrowdStrike Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
news.summary: CRWD tops Q4 estimates with $1.31B revenues, up 23.6% Y/Y, as subscription growth lifts ARR to $5.25B and operating income jumps.

news.title: CrowdStrike Beats, But AI Concerns Persist
news.summary: CrowdStrike earnings beat estimates, and ARR surged, but concerns about agentic AI and software pricing pressure keep CRWD stock in recovery mode

news.title: Why proving AI growth drivers is crucial for software landscape
news.summary: CrowdStrike stock (CRWD) is on a rollercoaster ride Wednesday morning after the cybersecurity firm reported fourth quarter results that just beat Wall Street's earnings and revenue estimates. Founder and CEO George Kurtz said that the company's fiscal 2026 will "go down in our history books as CrowdStrike's best year yet." RBC Capital Markets managing director and head of global TIMT research Matt Hedberg comes on the program to discuss CrowdStrike's guidance and how important AI will be for driving growth in the software landscape. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

news.title: Wall Street Just Sent a Split but Bullish Signal on CRWD — Here’s What Four Major Firms Actually Said
news.summary: Wall Street is sending a split but net-bullish signal on CRWD after CrowdStrike’s record fourth quarter. Two firms raised price targets following the print, two trimmed theirs, but every analyst on the list sees meaningful upside from where the stock trades today. news.title: DA Davidson Maintains Buy on CrowdStrike Holdings, Raises Price Target to $455
news.summary: DA Davidson  analyst Rudy Kessinger   maintains CrowdStrike Holdings (NASDAQ:CRWD) with a Buy and raises the price target from $425 to $455.

news.title: Macquarie Maintains Neutral on CrowdStrike Holdings, Lowers Price Target to $400
news.summary: Macquarie  analyst Steve Koenig   maintains CrowdStrike Holdings (NASDAQ:CRWD) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $485 to $400.

news.title: CrowdStrike delivers strong Q4 report, surpasses $5B in annual recurring revenue
news.summary: CrowdStrike Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:CRWD) reported fourth quarter earnings that topped Wall Street expectations as the cybersecurity company cited growing demand driven in part by increasingly sophisticated artificial intelligence-powered threats. news.title: CrowdStrike Holds Steady on Wednesday While GitLab Plunges 9% After Earnings
news.summary: Two software names, both beaten down heading into earnings night. One delivered. One didn’t. That contrast is playing out in premarket trading this Wednesday morning, with CrowdStrike (Nasdaq: CRWD) holding steady while GitLab (Nasdaq: GTLB) is getting hit hard. news.title: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on CrowdStrike Holdings, Raises Price Target to $395
news.summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Peter Levine   maintains CrowdStrike Holdings (NASDAQ:CRWD) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $375 to $395.

news.title: CrowdStrike Forecasts Up to $1.364B Revenue as AI Cyber Threats Rise
news.summary: Cybersecurity firm projects April-quarter sales roughly in line with estimates after reporting 23% revenue growth in the latest quarter.
